[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000010 1
1 00101000 2
2 10010100 3
3 10001011 4
4 10101101 5
5 00000100 1
6 01101001 4
7 11000100 3

01 10 10000100 2
12 21 10000001 2
23 32 10001001 3
34 43 00000100 1 match 5
45 54 00000000 a
56 65 01000000 1
67 76 00000000 a
70 07 00000000 a

02 20 10001000 2
13 31 10000101 3
24 42 00000000 a
35 53 00101001 3
46 64 00000100 1 match 5
57 75 00000001 1
60 06 11000100 3 match 7
71 17 00000001 1

03 30 10101100 4
14 41 00000100 1 match 5
25 52 00001001 2
36 63 10000100 2
47 74 00000000 a
50 05 01101000 3
61 16 10000100 2
72 27 00000011 2

04 40 00000100 1 match 5
15 51 00000001 1
26 62 10000000 1
37 73 00000001 1
